Terms_page.title: Terms and Conditions
Terms_page.terms_1_0: Welcome to our service. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service (Terms). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use our service.
Terms_page.terms_1_1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.
Terms_page.terms_2_0: To access certain features of our service, you must register for an account. You agree to:
Terms_page.terms_2_1: Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration
Terms_page.terms_2_2: Maintain and promptly update your account information
Terms_page.terms_2_3: Maintain the security of your password and account
Terms_page.terms_2_4: Accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account
Terms_page.terms_2_5: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
Terms_page.terms_2_6: You must be at least 13 years old to create an account. If you are under 18, you must have parental or guardian consent.
Terms_page.terms_3_0: You agree not to use our service to:
Terms_page.terms_3_1: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
Terms_page.terms_3_2: Infringe upon the rights of others, including intellectual property rights
Terms_page.terms_3_3: Upload or transmit viruses, malware, or any malicious code
Terms_page.terms_3_4: Harass, abuse, threaten, or intimidate other users
Terms_page.terms_3_5: Post or transmit spam, advertisements, or unsolicited messages
Terms_page.terms_3_7: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems or other users' accounts
Terms_page.terms_3_8: Interfere with or disrupt the service or servers
Terms_page.terms_3_9: Use automated systems (bots, scripts) without our permission
Terms_page.terms_4_0: All content, features, and functionality on our service, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, icons, images, audio clips, and software, are the exclusive property of our service or its licensors and are protected by international copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property laws.
Terms_page.terms_4_1: You retain ownership of content you submit to our service. By submitting content, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, adapt, publish, and display such content in connection with the service.
Terms_page.terms_5_0: Your use of the service is also governed by our Privacy Policy. We collect, use, and protect your personal information as described in our Privacy Policy. By using our service, you consent to such processing and warrant that all data provided by you is accurate.
Terms_page.terms_6_0: Our service may include games and virtual items. You acknowledge that:
Terms_page.terms_6_1: Virtual items have no real-world value
Terms_page.terms_6_2: We reserve the right to modify or remove virtual items at any time
Terms_page.terms_6_3: Virtual items are non-transferable and non-refundable
Terms_page.terms_6_4: You do not own virtual items; you are granted a limited license to use them
Terms_page.terms_7_0: Our service includes chat and messaging features. You agree to use these features responsibly and in accordance with these Terms. We reserve the right to monitor, record, and review communications to ensure compliance with our Terms and applicable laws.
Terms_page.terms_8_0: We may suspend or terminate your account at any time, with or without notice, for conduct that we believe:
Terms_page.terms_8_1: Violates these Terms or other policies
Terms_page.terms_8_2: Is harmful to other users, third parties, or our business interests
Terms_page.terms_8_4: You may terminate your account at any time by contacting us. Upon termination, your right to use the service will immediately cease.
Terms_page.terms_9_0: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.
Terms_page.terms_9_1: We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free, or that defects will be corrected.
Terms_page.terms_10_0: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, WE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES, WHETHER INCURRED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, OR ANY LOSS OF DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES.
Terms_page.terms_10_1: Our total liability to you for all claims arising out of or relating to these Terms or your use of the service shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the past twelve months, or $100, whichever is greater.
Terms_page.terms_11_0: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless our company, its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses, including reasonable attorneys' fees, arising out of or in any way connected with your access to or use of the service, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of any rights of another.
Terms_page.terms_12_0: Any disputes arising out of or relating to these Terms or the service shall be resolved through binding arbitration, except that either party may seek injunctive relief in court to prevent irreparable harm.
Terms_page.terms_12_1: You and we agree to waive any right to a jury trial or to participate in a class action.
Terms_page.terms_13_0: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the applicable jurisdiction, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
Terms_page.terms_14_0: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
Terms_page.terms_15_0: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
Terms_page.terms_15_2: By using our service, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

Privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy_page.privacy_1_0: This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, and what rights you have when using Transcendence.
Privacy_page.privacy_2_0: Depending on how you use the service, we may collect:
Privacy_page.privacy_2_1: Account information: username, email address, encrypted password.
Privacy_page.privacy_2_2: Profile data: avatar, language preferences, and user settings.
Privacy_page.privacy_2_3: Game and social data: scores, match history, friend lists, and friend requests.
Privacy_page.privacy_2_4: Technical data: IP addresses, application logs, session and browser information.
Privacy_page.privacy_3_1: Provide, secure, and improve the platform.
Privacy_page.privacy_3_2: Manage authentication, communication, and social features.
Privacy_page.privacy_3_3: Prevent fraud, abuse, and activity that violates our terms.
Privacy_page.privacy_4_0: Processing is based on performance of the service, your consent (when required), and our legitimate interest in ensuring platform security, reliability, and proper operation.
Privacy_page.privacy_5_0: We do not sell personal data. We may share it only with:
Privacy_page.privacy_5_1: Technical service providers required to operate the service.
Privacy_page.privacy_5_2: Competent authorities when required by law.
Privacy_page.privacy_5_3: Third parties in case of legal reorganization (merger, acquisition), with appropriate safeguards.
Privacy_page.privacy_6_0: We keep data only for as long as necessary for the purposes described.
Privacy_page.privacy_6_1: Account data is retained while your account remains active.
Privacy_page.privacy_6_2: Some data may be retained longer to comply with legal or security obligations.
Privacy_page.privacy_7_0: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, alteration, or disclosure.
Privacy_page.privacy_8_0: Depending on applicable law, you may:
Privacy_page.privacy_8_1: Access, correct, delete, or restrict the processing of your data.
Privacy_page.privacy_8_2: Withdraw consent and request data portability where applicable.
Privacy_page.privacy_9_0: We use cookies and local storage to maintain your session, remember your preferences, and improve user experience. You can configure your browser to limit these uses.
Privacy_page.privacy_10_0: For any question about this Privacy Policy, contact us at: support@transcendance.com.
Privacy_page.privacy_10_1: We may update this policy at any time. The latest version is always published on this page.
